features: Lightly fragranced for sensitive skin comfort gel formula lathers quickly, spreads easily
Spreads easily and reduces friction and irritation
Softens your hair even more and helps further lessen the effort needed to remove it
Use slow circular motions to cover all the areas you shave
description: Product Description Gillette series sensitive skin shaving gel is lightly fragranced for sensitive skin. It has comfort gel formula lathers quickly, spreads easily and reduces friction and irritation. It hydrates, protects and refreshes and use slow circular motions to cover all the areas you shave. If you have sensitive skin, let the shave gel soak in for as long as possible, this softens your hair even more and helps further lessen the effort needed to remove it. Ingredients Aqua, Palmitic Acid, Triethanolamine, Isopentane, Glyceryl Oleate, Stearic Acid, Isobutane, Sorbitol, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Parfum, Myristic Acid, Lauric Acid, PTFE, PEG-90M, PEG-23M, Propylene Glycol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Silica, BHT, Benzyl Salicylate, Limonene, Linalool, CI 42090 Box Contains product See more
